latest_release.name: Version 2.0.17
latest_release.body:
- Add ksh support for OpenBSD (and mksh/pdksh) [[#87](https://github.com/wp-cli/shell-command/pull/87)]
- Repurpose --quiet flag to suppress automatic REPL output [[#85](https://github.com/wp-cli/shell-command/pull/85)]
- Regenerate README file [[#84](https://github.com/wp-cli/shell-command/pull/84)]
- Catch exceptions in REPL to preserve session state on errors [[#83](https://github.com/wp-cli/shell-command/pull/83)]
- Add --hook flag to validate WordPress hook execution before shell starts [[#82](https://github.com/wp-cli/shell-command/pull/82)]
- Prefer /bin/bash and validate SHELL points to bash before using it [[#81](https://github.com/wp-cli/shell-command/pull/81)]
- Fix internal variable bleeding in REPL eval context [[#80](https://github.com/wp-cli/shell-command/pull/80)]
- Fix history command error when input starts with dash [[#78](https://github.com/wp-cli/shell-command/pull/78)]
- Add restart command and --watch option to wp shell [[#77](https://github.com/wp-cli/shell-command/pull/77)]
